      "それはシェディ・レコードの15周年記念アルバム、シェディXVのために再結成したことによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それはボクシング映画サウスパウのために2曲を録音したことによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それはエミネムのアルバムカミカゼの曲「ノットアライク」のために再結成したことによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それはエミネムがロイスの曲「キャタピラー」でフィーチャーされたことによって特徴づけられます。"

About: It is about a hip hop super duo.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Royce da 5′9″.
It is associated with Eminem.

It has a double single debut.
It has an extended play reunion.

It has a second single "Lighters".

It has three tracks on Eminem's album Music To Be Murdered By.

It is characterized by a reunion after Royce's supergroup Slaughterhouse signed to Eminem's Shady Records.

It is characterized by the EP Hell: The Sequel being certified platinum by the RIAA.
It is characterized by the lead single "Fast Lane" peaking at number thirty-two on the Billboard Hot 100.
It is characterized by the second single "Lighters" featuring Bruno Mars peaking at number four on the Billboard Hot 100.
It is characterized by a return for the 15-year anniversary album for Shady Records, Shady XV.
It is characterized by recording two tracks for the boxing film Southpaw.
It is characterized by a reunion for the song "Not Alike" on Eminem's album Kamikaze.
It is characterized by Eminem being featured on Royce's song "Caterpillar".
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by Eminem's The Slim Shady LP.
It was influenced by the song "Bad Meets Evil".
It was influenced by the horror comedy parody film Scary Movie.
It was influenced by a feud between Royce and the members of Eminem's group D12.
It was influenced by the death of Proof.
It was influenced by Royce's supergroup Slaughterhouse signing to Eminem's Shady Records.
It was influenced by the EP Hell: The Sequel.
It was influenced by the song "Fast Lane".
It was influenced by the song "Lighters".
It was influenced by the album Shady XV.
IsA: It is an American hip hop super duo.
It is a duo composed of Royce da 5′9″ and Eminem.
KnownAs: It is known as "bad" (Royce da 5′9″) and "evil" (Eminem).
KnownFor: It is known for its debut double single "Nuttin' to Do" and "Scary Movies".
It is known for its EP Hell: The Sequel.
It is known for the single "Fast Lane".
It is known for the single "Lighters".
It is known for its contributions to the Shady XV album.
It is known for its contributions to the Southpaw Soundtrack.
It is known for its contributions to Eminem's album Kamikaze.
It is known for its contributions to Royce's album Book of Ryan.
It is known for its contributions to Eminem's album Music To Be Murdered By.
NamedAfter: It is named after the namesake song from Eminem's The Slim Shady LP.
OccurredIn: It occurred in 1997.
It occurred in 1998.
It occurred in 1999.
It occurred in 2000.
It occurred in 2002.
It occurred in 2006.
It occurred in 2011.
It occurred in 2014.
It occurred in 2015.
It occurred in 2018.
ProducedBy: It was produced by Supa Dups and Jason "JG" Gilbert.
It was produced by Battle Roy.
It was produced by Eminem, The Smeezingtons and Battle Roy.
It was produced by Shady Records.

It is used in the Southpaw Soundtrack.
It is used in Eminem's album Kamikaze.
It is used in Royce's album Book of Ryan.
It is used in Eminem's album Music To Be Murdered By.
WrittenBy: It was written by Eminem, Royce da 5'9" and Sly "Pyper" Jordan.
It was written by Eminem and Mars.

それはエミネムがロイスの曲「キャタピラー」でフィーチャーされたことによって特徴づけられます。
